external_dependencies.reason: Gradient text utility (T5) uses accent color tokens defined in F1

tasks.name: Add display headline tokens with fluid sizing
tasks.purpose: Define 3 fluid display sizes (xl, lg, md) using clamp() for responsive scaling without media queries, including letter-spacing and line-height properties

dependencies: --accent-primary from F1 (for reference in later tasks)

tasks.input_state: theme.css has existing --text-display and --text-display-2 tokens; no homepage-specific display tokens exist
tasks.output_state: theme.css contains --homepage-text-display-xl, --homepage-text-display-lg, --homepage-text-display-md with associated line-height and letter-spacing properties
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Three display headline tokens defined with clamp() sizing and associated typographic properties
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-text-display' apps/web/styles/theme.css && test $(grep -c 'homepage-text-display' apps/web/styles/theme.css) -eq 9 && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add heading tokens (h1-h4)
tasks.purpose: Define 4 heading sizes (h1-h4) with appropriate letter-spacing and line-height for homepage sections

constraints: Include line-height and letter-spacing for each

tasks.input_state: theme.css has display tokens from T1; existing --text-h2 and --text-h3 tokens for reference
tasks.output_state: theme.css contains --homepage-text-h1, --homepage-text-h2, --homepage-text-h3, --homepage-text-h4 with associated typographic properties
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Four heading tokens defined with fixed rem sizing and associated typographic properties
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-text-h' apps/web/styles/theme.css && test $(grep -c 'homepage-text-h' apps/web/styles/theme.css) -eq 12 && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add body text tokens (body-lg, body, body-sm)
tasks.purpose: Define 3 body text sizes optimized for readability with appropriate line-height

constraints: Include line-height for each (1.6 per spec)

tasks.input_state: theme.css has display and heading tokens from T1-T2; existing body tokens for reference
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Three body text tokens defined with fixed rem sizing and line-height of 1.6
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-text-body' apps/web/styles/theme.css && test $(grep -c 'homepage-text-body' apps/web/styles/theme.css) -eq 6 && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Add utility text tokens (caption, overline)
tasks.purpose: Define caption and overline tokens for labels, metadata, and section markers with appropriate text-transform and letter-spacing

constraints: Overline: 0.75rem with 0.1em letter-spacing and uppercase transform

tasks.input_state: theme.css has display, heading, and body tokens from T1-T3
tasks.output_state: theme.css contains --homepage-text-caption and --homepage-text-overline with associated typographic properties including text-transform for overline
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Two utility text tokens defined with caption for labels and overline for uppercase section markers
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'homepage-text-caption\|homepage-text-overline' apps/web/styles/theme.css && test $(grep -c 'homepage-text-caption\|homepage-text-overline' apps/web/styles/theme.css) -ge 4 && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create text gradient utility class
tasks.purpose: Add .text-gradient-homepage utility class for gradient text effects on highlighted keywords using accent colors from F1
tasks.input_state: globals.css has @layer base styles; no text gradient utility exists yet
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .text-gradient-homepage class with gradient text effect using accent colors
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Text gradient utility class exists and uses background-clip technique with accent gradient colors
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'text-gradient-homepage' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep -q 'background-clip: text' apps/web/styles/globals.css && pnpm typecheck

tasks.name: Create text highlight utility class
tasks.purpose: Add .text-highlight-homepage utility class for animated underline effect on keywords using ::after pseudo-element

constraints: Underline: 6px height, accent color with 40% opacity, slight rotation (-1deg)
Apply mask-image for fade effect on edges

tasks.input_state: globals.css has text gradient utility from T5; no text highlight utility exists yet
tasks.output_state: globals.css contains .text-highlight-homepage class with animated underline effect via ::after pseudo-element
tasks.acceptance_criterion: Text highlight utility class exists with ::after pseudo-element creating accent-colored underline with rotation and mask-image fade
tasks.verification_command: grep -c 'text-highlight-homepage' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep -q '::after' apps/web/styles/globals.css && grep -q 'mask-image' apps/web/styles/globals.css && pnpm typecheck

groups.name: Typography Tokens
groups.description: Add all typography tokens to theme.css (sequential due to same file)

groups.name: Text Effect Utilities
groups.description: Add text effect utility classes to globals.css (sequential due to same file)
